message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Beregning af BMI
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
    LifeLineBorderColor #808080
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
    ParticipantBorderColor #808080
    ParticipantPadding 10
    BoxPadding 10
}

actor "bruger" as User
participant "index.jsp" as IndexJsp
participant "resultat.jsp" as ResultJsp

box "BmiUtil" #LightGray
    participant "Initializer" as Initializer
end box

box "PresentationLayer" #LightGray
    participant "FrontController" as FrontController
    participant "Command" as Command
    participant "Resultat" as Resultat
end box

box "LogicFacade" #LightGray
    participant "LogicFacade" as LogicFacade
end box

box "DBAccess" #LightGray
    participant "BmiMapper" as BmiMapper
end box

participant "BmiDB" as BmiDB

User -> IndexJsp: 1 start

== Initialization ==

IndexJsp -> Initializer: 2 getSportList()
IndexJsp <-- Initializer: 3 ArrayList<Sport>

== Beregn BMI ==

IndexJsp -> FrontController: 4 doPost()
activate FrontController
FrontController -> FrontController: 5 processRequest()
FrontController -> Command: 6 from()
FrontController <-- Command: 7 Resultat
FrontController -> Resultat: 8 execute()
activate Resultat
Resultat -> LogicFacade: 9 insertBmiItem()
activate LogicFacade
LogicFacade -> BmiMapper: 10 insertBmiItem()
activate BmiMapper
BmiMapper -> BmiDB: 11 executeQuery()
activate BmiDB
BmiMapper <-- BmiDB: 12 OK
deactivate BmiDB
LogicFacade <-- BmiMapper: 13 OK
deactivate BmiMapper
Resultat <-- LogicFacade: 14 OK
deactivate LogicFacade
FrontController <-- Resultat: 15 resultat
deactivate Resultat
FrontController --> ResultJsp: 16 forward()
deactivate FrontController

User
IndexJsp
ResultJsp
Initializer
FrontController
Command
Resultat
LogicFacade
BmiMapper
BmiDB

@enduml
```
